title: Saturn’s Failure Echoes Upward
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Luffy, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Five Elders as Egghead’s aftermath reshapes the world: Vegapunk’s truth spreads, Saturn faces consequences, and the route toward Elbaf opens.
scene: Egghead’s aftermath reshapes the world: Vegapunk’s truth spreads, Saturn faces consequences, and the route toward Elbaf opens.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll let the youngsters give you the details when they're up.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You better not be slackin' off again, borsalino!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey, Sakurazuki... I'm curious...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have you ever had to kill your best friend?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's a damn big head!!! I'm with the navy; the name's borsalino!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: How much are you gonna pay me?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This arrest is all a facade. You guys want my brain working for you, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, how much funding are you willing to give for my research?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Heh heh! you're an interesting guy, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you gonna do with this place?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm gonna call it "egghead."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When we're done, it'll be an island 500 years in the future!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Lend me a hand, borsalino!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey!!! You know I'm an Admiral now... right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You think I'm slackin' off...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...SAKAZUKI?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, if you've got time to waste doubting me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Come and see for yourself, you damn ingrate!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That was my bad, brother.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Just watch your mouth!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's so quiet...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess the party was officially called off?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's odd to stop after just one drink.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, and it's strange to see Luffy so dejected...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I get it, we failed to accomplish our main goal...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please can you take me away from Egghead?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We had the five elders, an Admiral, CPO, the Seraphim, and an armada of Warships to get through!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm still tryna wrap my head around that!! It's a miracle we got out of that hellscape at all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm with you there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's pathetic. He's an Emperor now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: an old man dying shouldn't affect him this badly.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That's a bit harsh...

summary: This part advances the Egghead Aftermath through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
